What's up guys, Joey here. So let's talk about Wayenday and what we are going to be, how we're going to be fulfilling Wayenday as soon as everybody comes in from your email campaigns, your texting campaigns, your Facebook reachouts. Now that all these people have scheduled their appointment and they are beginning to show up at your gym, what are you going to do with them? So the process is fairly straightforward. You're going to be doing your nutrition orientation and you are going to be first getting their before pictures. So make sure you get before pictures because you are going to really need those when it comes to using this as social proof as to what can happen in 21 days as soon as you get those after pics. So make sure you get the before pictures. Make sure you explain how the challenge works and make sure that you get them logged into your 42 day detox portal. So you'll be explaining to them that they're only using half of it and let's say they're just going to be essentially picking from weeks 1, 2, 3, or 4, 5, 6, or picking the meal plans A or week B or week C. Explain to them, show them, open up the portal on your computer and actually create a login with them. That way when they receive the text message with that portal information, they'll click right on it and they already know how to navigate it and every time you take them through that portal in person and make them create a login, those are the people that actually use it the most. So do that with them in person. You'll probably be doing that in an office so it's a perfect time to start talking about the nutrition plan in that portal and how the nutrition plan works and that's a perfect segue into selling them subs. So that's the way that we're going to be running this play is get them in, get them on the in body or your scale and get their measurements for the beginning of it. Then you want to go through how the challenge works and you want to go through getting the before pictures and assigning them their nutrition plan, signing them into your 42-day detox portal and then begin your nutrition orientation where you explain everything in that portal, really dive deep right into nutrition and that's a perfect segue into selling them supplements before they take off and you grab the next groups. So when it comes to selling supplements, it will be a perfect transition because you're already talking about nutrition. This entire process should take anywhere from 20 to 30 minutes per person and it's recommended that if it's your first time running this challenge that you take 30 minutes and you do it with a group of one-on-one or one-on-two. So that is how we're going to be doing the nutrition orientation and weigh-in day and the next video we'll go into how to fulfill the actual challenge itself.
